description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and clean, geometric lines. The exterior is predominantly white, complemented by wooden fencing and landscaping elements such as palm trees and shrubs. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically across the facades, allowing for ample natural light. The property is enclosed by a low wooden fence, with a paved entryway and a small patio area visible at the front. The landscaping is minimalistic, featuring a mix of hardscape and softscape elements. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, openness, and integration with the outdoor environment.
description: A modern, single-story white bungalow with a flat roof, wooden fencing, large windows, and minimalistic landscaping featuring palm trees and a paved entryway.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the main entrance, paved patio, and prominent wooden fencing with landscaping elements.
description_view_1: Left-side view highlighting the asymmetrical window arrangement and the continuation of the wooden fence.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back garden area, more wooden fencing, and additional landscaping.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the main entrance, symmetrical window placement, and the paved entryway with surrounding greenery.
